barRaise.topFinding: The story inverted since 06-10. The two issues that made last run trend toward at-risk are both closed: v0.13.1 shipped the D-011 409 route fix with a regression test, and the canonical-audit auto-enqueue is reaching the shared work queue again (fresh 06-10 YaB items are present). What remains is six MEDIUM hygiene items, none of them product defects: a git-history scrub, a keytar key-escrow doc, a keytar dependency swap, a queue prune, a dashboard reconcile, and a clean-tree commit. The highest-leverage move is the most boring one: commit the finished doc and dashboard batch currently sitting uncommitted so the gains become durable.
